headlines.title: British government may ‘intervene’ in Paramount’s takeover of Warner Bros.
headlines.description: The British government suggested Tuesday it may challenge Paramount Skydance’s blockbuster $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Justices rule Trump can’t fire Fed member but grant more power over independent agencies
headlines.description: The Supreme Court allowed Lisa Cook to keep her job while green-lighting the president’s firing of FTC Commissioner Rebecca Slaughter.

headlines.title: Consumers Pay the Price of ‘Funflation’ as Live Event Prices Soar
headlines.description: If you’ve experienced summer sticker shock, you’re not alone. ‘Funflation’ is sending prices for sporting events and concerts soaring, straining family budgets. Reporting for TODAY, NBC’s Emilie Ikeda looks at ways to enjoy the season without draining your savings.

headlines.title: 'We started with a maxed-out credit card': How The Nitro Bar became a booming coffee business
headlines.description: As part of the series Women Mean Business, NBC News' Savannah Sellers spoke with The Nitro Bar co-founder Audrey Finocchiaro about building a fast-growing coffee brand, expanding to New York City, and turning a bold idea into a thriving business.

headlines.title: How AI is Changing the Job Market and Workplace in America
headlines.description: New college graduates are entering the workforce at a time of uncertainty: a tight job market, an unemployment high for Gen Z and concerns that artificial intelligence will make a difficult job search even harder. NBC’s Christine Romans reports in this week’s Sunday Focus.

headlines.title: Poppi founder Allison Ellsworth on building a billion-dollar soda business
headlines.description: Allison Ellsworth, the founder of the viral soda brand Poppi, sits down with NBC News' Savannah Sellers to discuss how she turned a personal health issue into a billion-dollar cultural phenomenon.

headlines.title: Trump’s ‘big, beautiful bill’ is bringing a big set of student loan changes
headlines.description: Starting Wednesday, many student borrowers may tackle higher repayment requirements, fewer program options and greater loan limits.

headlines.title: Chicago news crew attacked near Adler Planetarium
headlines.description: CBS Chicago said a reporter and photographer were preparing for a newscast when two men rushed toward them, shouting racial slurs at one of the journalists.

headlines.title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky into separate company
headlines.description: The move will separate Comcast’s media and entertainment assets from its broadband and wireless business.

headlines.title: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Gas cost calculator: How much have higher gas prices cost you?
headlines.description: Americans have spent an estimated $33 billion more in gas since the Iran war started. According to an NBC News analysis, drivers who fill up twice a month paid anywhere from $20 to $300 more for gas.
